properties.name: Kilbroney Park
properties.description: Home to the magical Narnia Trail and the 'Cloughmore Stone.' Offers stunning views over Carlingford Lough and a fantastic large playground.

properties.name: Delamont Country Park
properties.description: Situated on the shores of Strangford Lough. Features a stunning 1km long miniature railway, a massive playground, and the Strangford Stone.

properties.name: Castlewellan Forest Park
properties.description: Famous for its Peace Maze and beautiful lake. Great for family cycling, forest walks, and seeing the stunning Victorian castle.

properties.name: Tollymore Forest Park
properties.description: A fairytale forest with gothic bridges, stepping stones, and beautiful river walks. A favorite for families and film fans alike.
